title: oenothera muricata var. canescens
intro: Oenothera muricata var. canescens, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its fragrant yellow flowers and hairy stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has anti-inflammatory and moisturizing effects. The health benefits of Oenothera muricata var. canescens include relief from menopausal symptoms, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and improved cardiovascular health. Oenothera muricata var. canescens is often used in herbal preparations, including supplements, salves, and oils, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
